channel.title: Tal Paperin Insights
channel.description: Field notes on B2B sales, fractional CRO leadership, go-to-market and fixing broken revenue.

item.title: B2B Pricing Models: Subscription, Usage, Hybrid, and When Each Wins
item.description: Subscription, usage-based, one-time and hybrid pricing each fit a different product and buyer. How to choose the model that fits yours.

item.title: How to Price a B2B Product: Value, Not Cost-Plus
item.description: Most B2B companies price by cost-plus or by copying a competitor and leave money on every deal. Here is how to price for the value you actually deliver.

item.title: Your Price Is Your Business Model
item.description: Price is not a number you bolt on at the end. It decides who you sell to, how you sell, your margins, and what you can spend to win a customer.

item.title: Business Development for Frum Businesses in Boro Park
item.description: Business Development for frum and heimishe business owners in Borough Park, Brooklyn, from a frum, shomer Shabbos operator. Shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls, real ownership of your revenue.

item.title: Growing Your Frum Business in Lakewood
item.description: Business Growth for frum and heimishe business owners in Lakewood, New Jersey, from a frum, shomer Shabbos operator. Shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls, real ownership of your revenue.

item.title: Frum Sales Consultant in Lakewood
item.description: Sales for frum and heimishe business owners in Lakewood, New Jersey, from a frum, shomer Shabbos operator. Shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls, real ownership of your revenue.

item.title: A Frum, Shomer Shabbos Fractional Sales Leader
item.description: A frum, shomer Shabbos fractional sales leader and business consultant who shares your values, respects your calendar, and takes real ownership of your revenue.

item.title: Frum Business Consultant in Boro Park
item.description: A frum, shomer Shabbos business consultant and fractional sales leader for frum and heimishe business owners in Borough Park, Brooklyn. Real sales ownership, shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls.

item.title: Sales Help for Heimishe Business Owners
item.description: Sales and business help for heimishe business owners, from a frum operator who respects the kehilla, the calendar and the way our world really does business.

item.description: Business Growth for frum and heimishe business owners in Crown Heights, Brooklyn, from a frum, shomer Shabbos operator. Shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls, real ownership of your revenue.

item.title: Building a B2B Sales Machine in Western Europe
item.description: How I build a sales machine in Western Europe: market research first, then a focused push on the UK and Eastern Europe, built and run hands-on, not handed over as a deck.

item.description: Sales for frum and heimishe business owners in Chicago, Illinois, from a frum, shomer Shabbos operator. Shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls, real ownership of your revenue.

item.title: Sales for the Yiddish-Speaking Business World
item.description: Sales leadership for the Yiddish-speaking, heimishe business world, from a frum operator who knows how it really buys and sells, and works in English with Yiddish-speaking owners.
